composition.method: Gram-Schmidt({v4_identity, v6_denial_engage}) — NO orth against v3
composition.note: Rebuilt for the Gemma-4 cutover; same composition as the Gemma-3 active subspace (v4 prompt-side + v6 completion-side AI-identity gate, no orth against v3).

convention: basis[k, L, :] is the k-th orthonormal basis vector at post-block-L residual position. basis[:, L, :] is the [K, d_model] tensor passed to install_runtime_ablation_hook in subspace mode at layer L.
